description_long: This lamppost features a tall, slender pole with a natural wood-like texture, supporting a single, modern, streamlined lamp head that extends outward on a gently curved metallic arm. The pole appears to be made of treated wood or a wood-finish metal, giving it a warm, urban aesthetic suitable for city streets or parks. The lamp head is sleek and rectangular, with a flat, slightly rounded design, likely housing an LED light source for efficient illumination. The mounting arm is metallic and gracefully arches from the top of the pole, providing both structural support and visual elegance. There are no visible decorative elements, signage, or attachments, emphasizing a minimalist, functional design. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, typical for public outdoor lighting.
description: A tall, wood-textured lamppost with a single, modern, rectangular lamp head on a curved metallic arm. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full height of the wood-textured pole and the outward-curving metallic arm with the lamp head clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the lamppost as a thin vertical line, with the lamp head appearing as a small circle at the top.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, displaying the pole and the lamp head extending outward on the curved arm.
description_view_3: Rear end-on view, showing the pole as a thin line and the lamp head as a small rectangle at the top.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Modern, rectangular, streamlined with a flat, slightly rounded profile
